name: Enterprise Community Partners
description_short: Enterprise Community Partners is a free credit assistance provider based in New York, New York. Rated 5.0/5 on Google.
description_long:
Enterprise Community Partners is a free credit assistance provider serving clients in New York, New York. The company serves consumers in the New York area who are looking to access free credit counseling and financial guidance.

Operating as a financial consultant, housing development, low income housing program, Enterprise Community Partners provides a range of services for consumers seeking free credit assistance solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Non-profit and free credit assistance providers in New York offer valuable resources for consumers who need help but may not be able to afford paid services. Enterprise Community Partners provides an important community service, and consumers should verify the organization's non-profit status and HUD-approval where applicable. Free counseling sessions can be a good starting point before committing to paid credit repair or debt relief programs.

Consumers in the New York, New York area who are considering Enterprise Community Partners should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any free credit assistance provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
